历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 8809 → 14816 → 18175 → 15532 → 13530, showing a V-shaped trend of first decreasing then increasing; in 2022, it significantly dropped to 14816, in 2023 further dropped to 18175, in 2024 rebounded to 15532, and in 2025 continued to rebound to 13530, with a cumulative forward shift of about 4645 positions in the last two years, and a 2025 baseline of approximately 13530; the university's enrollment plan in Jilin Province for Science/Physics Category was 2 in 2021, 4 in 2022, 6 in 2023, 4 in 2024, and 4 in 2025; the 2026 plan remains 4, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Ningxia University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science main ranking has been rising in recent years, from 170th in 2021 to 137th in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength, which has a positive effect on application attractiveness; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving library management incidents, with no major negative public opinion; total Douyin heat ranking is 104th, rated as 'average', with medium-low exposure on short video platforms, no high attention signals; no historical abnormal admission records for Ningxia University, no signs of cutoff drops or crashes; Ningxia University did not enter A- or above in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, currently lacking top-tier disciplines; but as a comprehensive university, it has certain accumulation in fields such as Grass Science, Ethnology, and Water Conservancy Engineering, attracting specific major applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's enrollment major in Jilin Province for Science/Physics Category is New Energy Materials and Devices (2026 plan 4 students), which belongs to the new energy materials field, with relatively high social popularity, aligning with the national dual-carbon strategy; the total number of candidates in Jilin Province in 2026 is 110,868, estimated with about 72.13% Physics Category proportion based on 2025, the 2026 Physics Category candidates are about 79,968, slightly decreasing by about 453 from 80,421 in 2025, easing competitive pressure; Ningxia University is located in Yinchuan, Ningxia, far from Jilin Province, requiring cross-province study; the university's enrollment scale in Jilin Province is small (only 4–6 per year), local candidates' willingness is limitedly affected by regional preference, but the 211 level still has some appeal to northeastern candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 13,530, unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, continuously rising Soft Science ranking (positive), slight decrease in Physics Category candidates (slightly eased competition), neutral reputation, etc., it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift forward compared to 2025 (slightly eased competition); predicted minimum ranking approximately 13,480, with a range of 12,980–13,980.
